exercises.question: Correct: كِتَابٌ الكَبِيرُ (should be: الكِتَابُ الكَبِيرُ)
Correct: مَدْرَسَةٌ الجَدِيدَةُ (should be: المَدْرَسَةُ الجَدِيدَةُ)
Correct: طَالِبٌ المُجْتَهِدُ (should be: الطَّالِبُ المُجْتَهِدُ)
Correct: بَيْتٌ الكَبِيرُ (should be: البَيْتُ الكَبِيرُ)

learned_items: Gender agreement: adjectives must match noun gender

exercises.question: Correct: طَالِبَةٌ مُجْتَهِدٌ (adjective should be feminine)
Correct: مَدْرَسَةٌ كَبِيرٌ (adjective should be feminine)
Correct: مُعَلِّمٌ جَمِيلَةٌ (adjective should be masculine)
Correct: كِتَابٌ جَدِيدَةٌ (adjective should be masculine)
Correct: طَاوِلَةٌ صَغِيرٌ (adjective should be feminine)
Correct: هٰذِهِ كِتَابٌ (should use masculine pronoun)
Correct: هٰذَا مَدْرَسَةٌ (should use feminine pronoun)
Correct: هٰذِهِ قَلَمٌ (should use masculine pronoun)
Correct: هٰذَا طَاوِلَةٌ (should use feminine pronoun)
Correct: هُوَ مُعَلِّمَةٌ (pronoun-noun mismatch)
Correct: هِيَ طَالِبٌ (pronoun-noun mismatch)
Correct: أَنْتِ مُجْتَهِدٌ (pronoun-adjective mismatch)
Correct: أَنْتَ طَالِبَةٌ (pronoun-noun mismatch)
Correct: هِيَ مُعَلِّمٌ (pronoun-noun mismatch)

learned_items: Idafa construction: first noun loses nunation

exercises.question: Correct: كِتَابٌ الطَّالِبِ (remove nunation)
Correct: بَابٌ البَيْتِ (remove nunation)
Correct: قَلَمٌ المُعَلِّمِ (remove nunation)
Correct: مَدْرَسَةٌ المَدِينَةِ (remove nunation)
